user.title: Set up Plug Protection
user.description: Protect a smart plug from being turned off while an appliance is running.

data_description.plug_entity: The switch entity of the smart plug to protect.
data_description.power_sensor: Sensor reporting current power consumption in Watts.
data_description.power_threshold: Protection activates above this value. Typical: 5-10 W for washing machines, 15-30 W for 3D printers.
data_description.cooldown_seconds: After power drops below threshold, protection stays active for this duration.
data_description.enable_notification: Display a persistent notification when a turn-off attempt is blocked.

error.same_entity: Plug entity and power sensor must be different entities.

init.title: Plug Protection Settings
init.description: Adjust protection parameters. Changes take effect immediately.
